name: TOP_FUNCTIONS_2024
description: Top functional categorys in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target)<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year = $year
RETURN f.name AS functional_category, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, collect(DISTINCT tp.name)[0..5] AS example_targetpairs
ORDER BY targetpair_count DESC, patent_count DESC, functional_category
LIMIT 10

examples: Across all target-pair combinations disclosed in 2024, which functional-of-target categories appear most frequently? Please provide the top 10 and example target pairs.
Within 2024 target-pair combinations, which functional-of-target classes are the most common overall? Please list the top 10 along with representative matching pairs.
Looking only at target-pair combinations from 2024, what are the top 10 most frequent functional-of-target categories, and what example target pairs correspond to them?
